name: physical-exit
title: Physical Exit
description: A card exits with physical momentum in toss, drop, or slide mode, carrying acceleration and rotation through the final offscreen pose without fading.
evidence: Video Primitives Wave F U13 physical-exit specification

variables.label: Exit mode
variables.description: Physical behavior used to carry the card offscreen.

variables.label: Card text
variables.description: Word displayed on the exiting card.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color applied to the card edge.
